name: AI Agent Governance (Propose / Approve)
description: A transparent workflow for treating AI agents as teammates: every agent-proposed action lands as a reviewable issue before it executes, with destructive actions forced through human approval.

teams.name: AI Operations
teams.description: Reviews and approves autonomous agent proposals before they run.

workflowStates.name: Proposed
workflowStates.description: An agent proposed this action; awaiting classification.

workflowStates.name: Under Review
workflowStates.description: A human is evaluating the proposal.

workflowStates.name: Executing
workflowStates.description: The agent is carrying out the approved action.

workflowStates.name: Rejected
workflowStates.description: Denied — the agent will not perform this action.

labels.name: read-only
labels.description: No side effects — safe to auto-approve.

labels.name: destructive
labels.description: Deletes, archives, or otherwise can't be trivially undone.

labels.name: needs-human-approval
labels.description: Policy requires an explicit human sign-off.

labels.name: auto-approved
labels.description: Approved automatically by policy (low-risk + high confidence).

labels.name: high-risk
labels.description: Touches billing, auth, or customer-facing data at scale.

issueTemplates.title: Agent proposal: Bulk-archive issues untouched for 180+ days
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Agent:** triage-bot v2

**Action:** `bulkArchive` on 340 matching issues across 4 teams.

**Reasoning:** These issues have had zero activity for 180+ days and match the workspace's staleness policy.

**Reversible:** Yes — archived issues can be restored within 90 days.

issueTemplates.title: Agent proposal: Auto-triage new bug reports with confidence ≥ 0.85
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Agent:** triage-bot v2

**Action:** On issue create, classify severity + route to the owning team when the model's confidence is ≥ 0.85; otherwise leave in the human triage queue.

**Reasoning:** Reduces time-to-first-response on clear-cut reports without risking a wrong route on ambiguous ones.

**Reversible:** Yes — routing can be manually corrected.

issueTemplates.title: Agent proposal: Send a weekly digest email to team leads
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Agent:** digest-bot

**Action:** Send a summary email every Monday 8am to each team lead (open issues, overdue items, cycle progress).

**Reasoning:** Requested by 3 team leads; read-only, no data mutation.

**Reversible:** N/A — no state change.

issueTemplates.title: Agent proposal: Merge 14 duplicate customer requests into their canonical threads
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Agent:** dedupe-bot

**Action:** Merge requests flagged as ≥ 0.9 semantic-similarity duplicates.

**Reasoning:** Reduces noise in the feedback intake queue; each merge preserves the original text as a linked comment.

**Reversible:** Partially — merges can be manually unwound but require support-team review.

issueTemplates.title: Agent proposal: Permanently delete draft issues abandoned 90+ days ago
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Agent:** cleanup-bot

**Action:** Hard-delete 58 draft (never-published) issues with no edits in 90+ days.

**Reasoning:** Drafts are pre-publication scratch space; deletion is safe by design.

**Reversible:** NO — this is a hard delete, not an archive. Requires explicit human approval regardless of confidence.

issueTemplates.title: Agent proposal: Rewrite 6 issue titles flagged as unclear for search
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Agent:** clarity-bot

**Action:** Suggest clearer titles for issues whose current title scored low on a clarity heuristic. Applies only after human accepts each suggestion individually.

**Reasoning:** Improves search/discoverability.

**Reversible:** Yes — original title is kept in issue history.

views.name: Pending Approval
views.description: Everything waiting on a human decision — the queue an approver checks first.

views.name: Audit Log
views.description: Every agent action, its approver, and its outcome — for compliance review.

views.name: All Agent Activity
views.description: Board grouped by status across every connected agent.
